skills.description: Trade crypto, stocks (AAPL, NVDA, TSLA), indexes, and commodities (GOLD, SILVER) 24/7 on Hyperliquid via HIP-3. Real-time position & P&L tracking, orderbook monitoring, multi-account management, and websocket client for sub-5ms low-latency high-frequency trading.
skills.description_zh: 通过HIP-3在Hyperliquid上7x24小时交易加密货币、股票（AAPL、NVDA、TSLA）、指数及大宗商品（黄金、白银）。支持实时仓位盈亏追踪、订单簿监控、多账户管理，以及延迟低于5毫秒的高频交易WebSocket客户端。
skills.name: Hyperliquid CLI (with HIP3 Support)
